notes: Includes modal-safe tool scheduling, structured asset package inspection, native UMG inspection/patching, native Material Instance inspection/patching, native Enhanced Input Blueprint event wiring, native component delegate event wiring, native UMG widget event wiring, native Blueprint pin default assignment, concrete Blueprint variable get/set node creation, configured Dynamic Cast node creation, native lifecycle/custom Blueprint event entry wiring, native typed Blueprint variable creation/update, native typed Blueprint function graph creation/update, configured Blueprint flow nodes for Branch, Sequence, and Self, and configured CreateWidget node creation for Widget Blueprint instantiation.
Requires a valid OmniForge license key to use chat, models, search, updates, and tools.
